warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
Wrist Mobilisation

metcon.name: Annie
metcon.description:
Scale to finish in 10 mins
start at 30-20-10

gymnastics:
HSW Progression
EMOM X 3 20s handstand hold
EMOM X 3 180 deg. Conan Walk (on box) x 2
EMOM X 3 5-10 Shoulder taps (or wall walk)
EMOM X 5 Tripod Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Spotted Freestanding Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Wall Facing - Walk away from wall (spotted)
Double Under Progression
Even Min Singles - focus on jumping higher
Odd Mins Penguin Clap Drill
Double Under attempts -
Double - single - single - single - Double
for the DU Experts - go for max sets every 2-3 mins

hypertrophy.reasoning: Annie and HSW work shoulders/core heavily; address posterior chain and pulling strength to balance.
